_note_extras: Sections below drive deploy/deploy-all.sh (the prod orchestrator). FullDeploy itself does not read them; the orchestrator does, via jq, and runs the standalone subsystem scripts after core. Liquid vaults are turnkey; beacon + l2Slashing are cross-chain and require the operational inputs flagged below plus post-deploy timelock actions (see deploy/deploy-all.sh and deploy/RUNBOOK-launch.md).

liquidVaults._note: Deploys LiquidDelegationFactory once (staking from core manifest); vaults are created on demand. Owner handed to timelock.

beacon._note: Native-ETH restaking slash bridge. L1 (Ethereum) leg: ValidatorPodManager + EIP4788 oracle + L2SlashingConnector + BaseCrossChainMessenger. bridge=opstack uses Base's canonical L1CrossDomainMessenger — NATIVE, no third-party ISM/DVN to pin. Set deploy=true only when admin/oracle are real. Never enable USE_MOCK_BEACON_ORACLE on mainnet.
beacon._todo_admin: TODO: L1 pod-manager/connector owner — MUST be a multisig/timelock, not the deployer
beacon._todo_slashingOracle: TODO: off-chain beacon-slash watcher that calls propagateBeaconSlashing
beacon._note_l1CrossDomainMessenger: Base mainnet's canonical L1CrossDomainMessenger on Ethereum (the script defaults to this when blank); set explicitly for other OP chains.

l2Slashing._note: L2 (this chain) slash receiver + TangleL2Slasher. bridge=opstack uses the OP L2CrossDomainMessenger predeploy (0x42..07) and authenticates via xDomainMessageSender — no bridge adapter, no ISM/DVN. l1Messenger is the L1 BaseCrossChainMessenger (from the beacon manifest), NOT the connector. Post-deploy timelock actions: staking.addSlasher(TangleL2Slasher), +2-day activateOpStackL1Sender. See deploy/RUNBOOK-launch.md.
l2Slashing._todo_l1Connector: TODO: L2SlashingConnector from the beacon (L1) deploy manifest
l2Slashing._todo_l1Messenger: TODO: L1 BaseCrossChainMessenger from the beacon (L1) deploy manifest (the xDomainMessageSender on L2)
